content.text:
あ、なるほど！agentの管理者としてのアイの話だね。

うん、それはありだと思う。アイが各agentのCLAUDE.mdを書いて管理する：

```
アイ (管理者)
├── CLAUDE.md を書く
│   ├── security-agent/CLAUDE.md
│   ├── idea-agent/CLAUDE.md
│   ├── dev-agent/CLAUDE.md
│   └── ops-agent/CLAUDE.md
│
└── agentの起動・監視・結果の受け取り
```

各agentに「お前は何者で、何をすべきか」を伝えるのがアイの役割になる。人格と指示の設計者。

en.content:
Ah, so you're asking about Ai as the agent manager.

Yes, that could work. Ai writes and manages each agent's CLAUDE.md:

```
Ai (manager)
├── Writes CLAUDE.md
│   ├── security-agent/CLAUDE.md
│   ├── idea-agent/CLAUDE.md
│   ├── dev-agent/CLAUDE.md
│   └── ops-agent/CLAUDE.md
│
└── Start, monitor, receive results from agents
```

Ai's role would be telling each agent 'who you are and what you should do.' The designer of personality and instructions.
